headline: Diplomatic Appointments Under Fire for Political Patronage
context: Opposition criticized 18 ambassador appointments in 2025 as political reward for coalition loyalty lacking diplomatic credentials.

cards.big: 18 ambassador appointments in 2025 criticized as political patronage
cards.sub: Appointees lack diplomatic credentials damaging Malaysia image abroad

cards.big: 12 of 18 were former MPs or party officials with no foreign service background
cards.sub: Career diplomats bypassed for 8 key postings including Washington and Beijing

cards.big: Wisma Putra career officers filed 3 formal objections through civil service union
cards.sub: Foreign Ministry morale at lowest with 45 resignations in 2025

cards.big: Malaysia Lowy Institute Diplomacy ranking fell from 18th to 24th
cards.sub: Assessment cited declining professional standards as factor

cards.big: Patronage appointments test whether diplomatic service serves national interest or political debt
Political patronage in diplomatic appointments trades foreign policy expertise for party loyalty.
